title: FlowsAqua
body:
Make the 1.8 pvp items better looking and simpler and make the game seem like your very own arena. Changes

- Sword textures
- Armor textures
- Blocks textures
- Tools textures
- Food textures
- Gui textures




And it changes the particle to blue and grey, heart to blue and black, hotbar to black and blue.
My other project: https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/reddragon-pvp
